businessSummary.oneLiner: The undisputed king of AI computing — dominating global AI infrastructure with data center GPUs and accelerators
businessSummary.description: NVIDIA is the world's largest semiconductor design company, with AI training/inference data center accelerators as the core revenue driver. FY2026 revenue $215.9B (+65.5% YoY), net income $120.1B (+64.8%). Friday close $180.25 (-1.58%). GTC 2026 (3/16-19) is D-2 amid market weakness. 'The Rubin Era' — Jensen Huang's keynote will be the litmus test for the entire AI sector. Palantir sovereign AI data center architecture announced. Market cap $4.38T, P/E 36.79x, Forward P/E 21.84x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Data Center: AI training/inference GPUs (H100, H200, Blackwell B200/GB200/GB300) — ~91% of revenue
Gaming: GeForce RTX GPUs — ~6% of revenue
Professional Visualization: Omniverse, RTX — ~2% of revenue

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for semiconductors. Reflects AI growth premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: PEG 0.57 vs +65% growth — structurally undervalued territory

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Historic growth momentum continuing. AI demand explosion

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Historically unprecedented level. Massive investment/return capacity

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reflects data center GPU monopoly margins

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 D-2 — Rubin R200 Unveiling + CPU-Centric AI Pivot
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): Agentic-optimized CPUs set to be unveiled at GTC. Evolution from GPU-only to CPU+GPU full-stack. Rubin architecture as the benchmark for next-gen AI infrastructure.

growthDrivers.title: Palantir + NVIDIA Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture Announced
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI data center architecture unveiled. GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, and others adopting Palantir platform + NVIDIA infrastructure.

growthDrivers.title: 93% of Analysts Rate Buy — Target $263 (+46% Upside)
growthDrivers.description: CoinCentral (3/13): 93% of 38 analysts rate Buy. Average target $263.29. This year's FCF projected at $178B (all-time record for any company).

growthDrivers.title: Forward P/E 21.84x — Historically Undervalued vs Growth Rate
growthDrivers.description: +65.5% growth with Forward P/E 21.84x, PEG 0.57. Market selloff has maximized valuation attractiveness.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: CUDA ecosystem locks in 15M+ developers, 90%+ AI training/inference GPU market share. Software + hardware integration is the core moat.

moats.description: 15M+ developers locked in. Most AI frameworks are optimized for CUDA.
Blackwell→Rubin→Feynman on 2-year architecture innovation cycle. 1-2 generations ahead of competitors.
Chips + Systems (DGX) + Software (CUDA, AI Enterprise) + Networking (Spectrum-X) integration.

competitors.name: AMD (MI400)
competitors.detail: AI GPU #2. Cost-effective alternative. Growing hyperscaler adoption

competitors.name: Intel (Gaudi 3)
competitors.detail: AI accelerator latecomer. Differentiating with Windows NPU focus

competitors.name: Google (TPU)
competitors.detail: In-house AI chips. Primarily internal use

competitors.name: Broadcom (ASIC)
competitors.detail: Custom AI chip design. Hyperscaler alternative

recentNews.headline: CNBC: GTC AI Chip Pivot — CPU Taking Center Stage
recentNews.significance: Agentic-optimized CPUs to be unveiled. GPU+CPU full-stack strategy expands AI infrastructure market.

recentNews.headline: Palantir + NVIDIA Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture Announced
recentNews.significance: Turnkey sovereign AI infrastructure. Government/defense AI market partnership synergy.

recentNews.headline: TipRanks: Is NVDA Still Undervalued Ahead of GTC? — -11.5% from ATH at $183
recentNews.significance: Stock trading at discount despite rising earnings estimates. GTC expected to catalyze revaluation.

recentNews.headline: CoinCentral: 93% Analysts Buy — FCF $178B (All-Time Record) Projected
recentNews.significance: Overwhelmingly bullish Wall Street consensus. This year's FCF projected to be the largest of any company ever.

recentNews.headline: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Official Blog — March 16-19 in San Jose
recentNews.significance: Jensen Huang keynote to unveil Rubin R200, agentic AI, and sovereign infrastructure.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 93% of 38 analysts rate Buy. GTC 2026 described as 'the ultimate test for the semiconductor giant and the AI sector.' Forward P/E 21.84x is undervalued vs +65% growth (PEG 0.57).

risks.title: GTC Expectations Miss Could Trigger 'Sell the News'
risks.description: GTC expectations are extremely elevated. If Rubin R200 specs disappoint or 2027 ship date, selling pressure likely.

risks.title: AI Investment Cycle Slowdown Possibility
risks.description: Hyperscaler CAPEX peak concerns. GPU demand could decrease if AI investment ROI is questioned.

risks.title: Export Controls — China Market Access Restricted
risks.description: US AI chip export restrictions to China tightening. China revenue share continuing to shrink.

risks.title: Custom ASIC Alternatives Rising
risks.description: Google TPU, AWS Trainium, Broadcom ASIC — in-house chip development trend accelerating.

buyReasons.title: PEG 0.57 — Historically Undervalued vs Growth
buyReasons.rationale: +65.5% growth with Forward P/E 21.84x. Market selloff has maximized valuation appeal.

buyReasons.title: GTC 2026 D-2 — Rubin Reveal as Powerful Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Next-gen GPU architecture unveiling. CPU expansion broadens TAM. Could revalue entire AI sector.

buyReasons.title: FCF $96.7B (This Year $178B Projected) — Cash Generation Monster
buyReasons.rationale: Historically unprecedented FCF. Abundant capacity for buybacks, dividend growth, and M&A.

buyReasons.title: CUDA Ecosystem Moat — Maximized Switching Costs
buyReasons.rationale: 15M developer lock-in. Switching to AMD/Intel practically impossible at this scale.

overallOpinion: NVIDIA trades in historically undervalued territory with Forward P/E 21.84x (PEG 0.57) ahead of GTC 2026 (D-2). Holding above the 200-day moving average, forming a technical floor.
Rubin R200 unveiling + CPU expansion + Palantir sovereign AI partnership are the key GTC catalysts. 93% of analysts rate Buy with $263 target (+46%).

GTC 'Sell the News' risk and AI investment cycle peak concerns exist, but the opportunity to buy a company growing +65% with $96.7B FCF at Forward P/E 22x is rare. The core holding for AI infrastructure investment.
